title: Windows 11 Edition Title
description: If Minecraft: Windows 11 Edition made by 4J Studios
body:
All Logos and/or branding belongs to Microsoft (Windows), Canonical (Ubuntu), RedHat (Fedora), and Judd Vinet (Arch), please don't sue me.

## Info
Have you ever heard of Minecraft: Windows 10 Edition... no? ok. This resource pack replaces the standard Java Edition Title to Windows 11 Edition Title for [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j/versions) and eventually [Legacy Tweaks](https://github.com/ViolaFlower/Legacy-Tweaks), use this resource pack on Windows 11 (NOT Windows 10... maybe), or even use this on Kubuntu, Fedora KDE Desktop, or Arch Linux that looks like Windows 11.
![Windows 11 Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95ec546db08a0b5bfab1f4b4a0eeaae0ce31cb21.png)
## Requirements
This requires [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j/versions) or [Legacy Tweaks(Not Finished)](https://github.com/ViolaFlower/Legacy-Tweaks) for this resource pack.

## You can use Modpacks Like
- [Re-Console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) by Nostalgica Reverie
- [Project4J](https://modrinth.com/modpack/project-4j/) by Cixon
- [Legacy Return](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-return) by Atreyu1227
- [William's Console: Revisited](https://modrinth.com/modpack/williams-console-revisited) by PeacefulWilliam and VoliaFlower
